samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulate 4 input data and output the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="idle" value="0">Idle state, waiting for valid_in.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="accumulate" value="1">Accumulate state, ready to receive data_in.</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="valid_out_reg" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the valid_out value.</reg>
        <reg id="data_out_reg" width_description="[9:0]" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the accumulated sum.</reg>
        <reg id="state_reg" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the current state.</reg>
        <reg id="count_reg" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the count of received data_in.</reg>
        <reg id="data_in_reg" width_description="[7:0]" type="sequential_logic">A register to store the current data_in.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <item>On each positive edge of the clock or when rst_n is low, if rst_n is low, valid_out_reg is set to 0.</item>
        <item>On each positive edge of the clock or when rst_n is low, if rst_n is low, data_out_reg is set to 0.</item>
        <item>On each positive edge of the clock or when rst_n is low, if rst_n is low, state_reg is set to idle.</item>
        <item>On each positive edge of the clock or when rst_n is low, if rst_n is low, count_reg is set to 0.</item>
        <item>On each positive edge of the clock or when rst_n is low, if rst_n is low, data_in_reg is set to 0.</item>
        <item>When valid_in is 1, data_in is a valid input.</item>
        <item>When the count_reg is 3, valid_out_reg is set to 1 and data_out_reg is set to the accumulated sum.</item>
        <item>When count_reg is 3, reset the count_reg to 0.</item>
        <item>When valid_in is 1 and count_reg is not 3, accumulate the data_in_reg to data_out_reg.</item>
        <item>When valid_in is 1 and count_reg is not 3, increment count_reg.</item>
        <item>When valid_in is 1 and count_reg is 3, set valid_out_reg to 0.</item>
    </implementation>
</module>
